mnemonics.title: Properties of a Hash Function
mnemonics.content:
**C**ollision Resistance (Find any m1 and m2)
**S**econd Pre-image Resistance (Find m2 for a given m1)
**P**re-image Resistance (Find m for a given h)

Remember: **C**ome **S**econd **P**lace (The order of 'strength': Collision is hardest to achieve, then Second Pre-image, then Pre-image).
